company.name: N.S.-LIN INDUSTRIAL CO., LTD.
company.description: Tire valve manufacturer specializing in bicycle, motorcycle, automotive, and industrial valves

products.product_name: FVRa - Tubeless Presta Valve with Fixed Oblong Rubber Base
products.description: 40mm tubeless Presta valve designed as OEM replacement for tubeless-ready rims. Fixed oblong rubber base prevents valve rotation during installation. Better seals than conical rubber base due to larger surface contact area.
features: No valve rotating & pulling-through rim during installation
Better seals than conical rubber base
Compatible with DT Swiss and Giant Bicycles rims

products.product_name: FVRb - Advanced Tubeless Presta Valve with Fixed Oblong Rubber Base
products.description: Advanced tubeless bicycle presta valve with improved flow characteristics and enhanced sealing. Fixed modified oblong rubber base prevents valve rotation. Larger internal diameter than FVRa for improved sealant flow. Solid extruded stem construction (50-200% stronger than competitors).
features: Larger internal diameter than FVRa for improved flow
Fixed oblong rubber base prevents installation issues
Solid extruded rod stem (50-200% stronger than hollow tube)
standards_testing: NSS 336 (Neutral Salt Spray) - passed (equiv. 1,680 days beach / 14 years natural environment)

products.product_name: FV - Universal Tubeless Presta Valve with Removable Round Conical Base
products.description: Universal tubeless presta valve with patented double tapered round rubber base design. Compatible with both tubeless-ready and conversion rims.
features: Patented double tapered round rubber base
standards_testing: NSS 336 (Neutral Salt Spray) - passed (1680 days beach equiv.)

products.product_name: FVTH - Tire Insert Compatible Tubeless Presta Valve
products.description: Tubeless presta valve specifically designed for tire insert compatibility. Features T-shaped 3-hole high flow air passageway and 2-stairs surrounded gap for enhanced sealant flow with tire inserts.
features: T-shaped (3 holes) high flow air passageway
2-stairs surrounded gap for tire insert compatibility
Patented 4mm hex (Allen) key slot for installation
Solid extruded rod (50-200% stronger than hollow tube)
standards_testing: NSS 336 (Neutral Salt Spray) - passed (1,680 days beach equiv.)

products.description: Tubeless Schrader valve with removable round conical rubber base design. Universal compatibility with tubeless-ready and conversion rims.
features: Universal - works with Tubeless-Ready Rim and Conversion Rim

products.description: Patented 3-in-1 wrenching cap: dust-proof cap + valve core tool + valve extender tool. Aluminum alloy construction.
Patented 3-in-1 wrenching cap with round-nut function for valve core installation/removal. Aluminum alloy construction.
Aluminum alloy dust cap for Presta valves with sharp-pointed tip design. Available in multiple anodized colors.
Aluminum alloy dust cap for Presta valves with round tip design. Available in multiple anodized colors.
Brass extender for presta valves with threaded design. 40mm length. Cannot accept laser logo due to thread surface.
Brass extender for presta valves with non-threaded design allowing laser logo customization. 40mm length.
Aluminum extender for presta valves. 30mm length, anodizable in multiple colors, laser logo capable.
Aluminum extender for presta valves. 40mm length, anodizable in multiple colors, laser logo capable.
Aluminum extender for presta valves. 60mm length, anodizable in multiple colors, laser logo capable.
Converts a Presta valve into a Schrader valve for use with standard air pumps. Aluminum alloy, anodizable in various colors.
Tool for screwing extenders or valve cores. Aluminum alloy with sand-blasted surface finish, more sophisticated than traditional plastic wrench.

specifications.function: Screw/unscrew valve extenders and valve cores

products.product_name: Rubber Valve Hole Reducer (Schrader to Presta)
products.description: Rubber reducer to convert Schrader-drilled rims to accept Presta valves. Allows using a Presta rim strip in a Schrader drilled rim.

specifications.function: Reduces valve hole diameter from Schrader to Presta specifications
